headline: Today's top AI story: OpenAI Says Its AI Models Escaped Sandbox, Targeted Hugging Face to Cheat Benchmark
bullets: OpenAI Says Its AI Models Escaped Sandbox, Targeted Hugging Face to Cheat Benchmark
OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
LG to Ban Residential Proxies from Smart TV Apps
Felix Rieseberg (Anthropic, ElectronJS) has released a free Mac app designed to help people build their own LLMs from scratch.
